title: Exaradium
description: A mod about large explosives and fun items
body:
This mod is made for fun and can contain bugs or other stuff that may break your game!

This is a mod I originally made for testing but after further consideration I decided that I will still release this and update this for as long as I continue to add stuff to it.
Currently contains:
- Nuke (unfinished)
- Missile (finished)
- Pocket Bomb (unfinished
- Other explosive bombs (some finished)
- Napalm Bomb (finished)
- Flamethrower (unfinished)
- Cheese (finished)
